scripts.milvus:up: docker-compose up -d && echo '✓ Milvus started at http://localhost:19530'
scripts.milvus:restart: npm run milvus:down && npm run milvus:up
scripts.milvus:health: curl -s http://localhost:9091/healthz && echo ' ✓ Milvus is healthy' || echo ' ✗ Milvus is not responding'
scripts.milvus:clean: docker-compose down -v && echo '⚠ Warning: All Milvus data deleted'
scripts.milvus:backup: tar -czf milvus-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).tar.gz volumes/ && echo '✓ Backup created'
scripts.index: npm run index:code && npm run index:docs
scripts.index:verify: python3 -c "from pymilvus import connections, utility; connections.connect('default', host='localhost', port='19530'); print('Collections:', utility.list_collections()); connections.disconnect('default')"
scripts.deps:check: python3 -c "import pymilvus, sentence_transformers; print('✓ All dependencies installed')" || echo '✗ Missing dependencies. Run: npm run deps:install'
scripts.dev:setup: npm run deps:install && npm run milvus:up && echo 'Waiting for Milvus to be ready...' && sleep 5 && npm run index
scripts.dev:start: npm run milvus:status || npm run milvus:up
scripts.help:
echo '
📚 WiseWealth Development Commands:
' && grep -E '^    "[^"]+":' package.json | sed 's/"//g' | sed 's/,$//' | awk -F: '{printf "  npm run %-20s # %s\n", $1, $2}' | head -20
scripts.help:milvus:
echo '
📘 Milvus Quick Reference:

Start:   npm run milvus:up
Stop:    npm run milvus:down
Index:   npm run index
Status:  npm run milvus:status

Full guide: docs/setup/_MILVUS_MCP_GUIDE.md
'
